error: YOSYS_PARSE_ERROR: Yosys 0.35 does not support multi-dimensional unpacked arrays (logic [A-1:0][B-1:0][C-1:0]). This is valid SystemVerilog (IEEE 1800-2017) but requires yosys >= 0.36 or alternative synthesis tool. Affected file: rtl/M00/src/M00_SystolicArray.sv line 137.

workarounds: Use Synopsys DC/Cadys Genus for full SV support
Modify RTL: flatten arrays to single dimension or use packed arrays
Use verilator --lint-only for verification, then synth with different tool
